name: Deck Request

## Deck request

**Core Pokémon / strategy**
<!-- What Pokémon or combo do you want to build around? -->

**Format**
- [ ] Standard (default)
- [ ] Expanded
- [ ] Other: ___

**Strategic goal**
- [ ] Aggro (fast prize trade)
- [ ] Control (denial / disruption)
- [ ] Combo (specific win condition)
- [ ] Spread (bench damage)
- [ ] Mill (deck out opponent)

**Budget constraints**
<!-- Any cards you want to avoid due to cost or availability? -->

**Collection constraints**
<!-- Any cards you own or specifically want included? -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Anything else about the meta, playstyle, or goals? -->
